transcription.text: For the finest breakfast variety to ever brighten your morning... Pick a pack of Cheerios, pick a pack of Trix, pick a pack of Jets, pick a pack of Kix and Wheaties too. The choice is up to you with the Betty Crocker Pick-a-Pack Package. Ten individual servings. Handiest cereal package of all. So next time... Pick a pack of Cheerios, pick a pack of Trix, pick a pack of Jets, pick a pack of Kix and Wheaties too. The choice is up to you with the Betty Crocker Pick-a-Pack Package. Thank you for watching.
